title: Batched Query > maxAllowedPacket size causes an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET age = age + 1 WHERE name = 'Alice';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR age > 25;
key_bug_features: Long SQL string exceeds maxAllowedPacket in batch execution
